speaker: speaker1
text: What's the matter with you , then ? You look miserable .

speaker: speaker1
text: What do you mean by " us " ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , we used to talk to each other before we were married . Remember ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What do you mean ? We ' re talking now , aren't we ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , yes , but we used to do so much together .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . I remember . But we never used to argue . You used to think I was wonderful . Where are you going ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Back to live with my parents . That's something else I used to do before we were married . Remember ?
